name: Ricercar
description: Fantasia: luminous flowing colour (RICERCAR-FL rebuild, the corrected paradigm after three marks-on-canvas rejections). A real GPU fluid dye simulation — family-coloured ink masses (strings violet, brass gold, woodwinds russet, percussion teal) billow down from the top of frame, bleeding and merging wet-into-wet on a warm light ground — with four glowing ribbons, one per instrument family, weaving and crossing across the frame as light-lines with soft halos. FL.3 state: hand-animated look-lock (no audio drive yet — FL.4 wires family capture to which colours bloom and zero-lag energy to flow vigour and ribbon undulation). See docs/presets/RICERCAR_DESIGN.md §FANTASIA REBUILD.
author: Matt
